Chart.js must be downloaded and placed in this directory before the plugin's admin pages will render charts.

Required file: chart.umd.min.js  (Chart.js 4.4.3, UMD build)

Download command:
  curl -o chart.umd.min.js \
    https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.3/dist/chart.umd.min.js

Or download manually from:
  https://github.com/chartjs/Chart.js/releases/tag/v4.4.3
  (grab chart.umd.min.js from the dist/ folder of the release zip)

Why bundled?
  WordPress.org plugin policy prohibits loading scripts from external CDNs.
  The file must be served from the plugin directory itself.
